components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button with primary color. Use for primary actions like submit, save, or create.
components.usage: Use for primary actions in forms and interfaces. Always make primary buttons easy to identify.
components.accessibility: Semantic <button> element. Always include clear text. Use aria-label if icon-only.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action button with outline style. Use for secondary or alternate actions.
components.usage: Use alongside primary buttons for less important actions. Good for cancel or back actions.
components.accessibility: Semantic button with clear distinguishing style from primary.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Minimal button with no background. Use for tertiary or subtle actions.
components.usage: Use for tertiary actions or minimal UI. Good for navigation or info links.
components.accessibility: Clear hover state provides visual feedback. Maintains text contrast.

components.name: Disabled Button
components.description: Button in disabled state. Use when action is unavailable.
components.usage: Use native disabled attribute. CSS handles visual feedback.
components.accessibility: Native disabled attribute is fully accessible. Cursor changes to indicate disabled state.

components.name: Small Button
components.description: Compact button for dense layouts or secondary areas.
components.usage: Use in toolbars, tables, or dense lists where space is limited.
components.accessibility: Maintain minimum 44px touch target on mobile devices.

components.name: Large Button
components.usage: Use for prominent CTAs on landing pages or hero sections.
components.accessibility: Large touch target is highly accessible on all devices.

components.name: Loading Button
components.usage: Use aria-busy attribute for async operations.
components.accessibility: aria-busy conveys loading state to screen readers. Disable interaction during loading.

components.name: Icon + Text Button
components.description: Button combining icon and text for clarity.
components.usage: Use icons to reinforce meaning. Keep text concise and clear.
components.accessibility: Icon should reinforce text, not replace it. Both should be visible.

components.name: Button Group
components.description: Multiple buttons grouped together for related actions.
components.usage: Group related actions together. Responsive on mobile.
components.accessibility: Clear spacing between buttons aids keyboard navigation.

components.name: Semantic Link
components.usage: Use semantic <a> for navigation. Always provide meaningful link text.
components.accessibility: Underline always visible. Never remove underline on hover/focus.

components.name: Basic Card
components.description: Simple card component with padding and subtle border.
components.usage: Flexible container for grouped content. Works in grids or lists.
components.accessibility: Semantic <article> element. Heading hierarchy maintained.

components.name: Card with Image
components.description: Card component with featured image at top.
components.html:
Card Title

Content description
components.usage: Great for blog posts, products, or portfolio items.
components.accessibility: Alt text required for images. Proper semantic order maintained.

components.name: Highlighted Card
components.description: Card with colored left border or background accent.
components.html:
Important

This card stands out from others.
components.usage: Use for featured or important content. Left border provides visual hierarchy.
components.accessibility: Color alone doesn't convey information. Use in combination with text.

components.name: Minimal Card
components.description: Card with no border, just spacing and subtle shadow.
components.html:
Subtle Card

Content with minimal visual presence.
components.usage: Use in contexts where cards should blend into layout.
components.accessibility: Sufficient contrast maintained for readability.

components.name: Interactive Card
components.description: Card that acts as a clickable link.
components.html:
Click to explore

This entire card is clickable.
components.usage: Use when entire card should be clickable. Provide clear visual feedback.
components.accessibility: Semantic <a> element. Hover and focus states clearly visible.

components.name: Card with Footer
components.description: Card with distinct footer section for metadata or actions.
components.html:
Card Title

Main content here

Posted: Jan 15
components.usage: Good for blog posts or list items with metadata.
components.accessibility: Footer marked with semantic <footer> element.

components.name: Card Grid
components.description: Container for displaying multiple cards in responsive grid.
components.usage: Use for gallery, portfolio, or product displays.
components.accessibility: Responsive layout adapts to all screen sizes.

components.name: Card with Badge
components.description: Card with status or category badge in corner.
components.html:
Featured

Card Title

Content with badge indicator
components.usage: Use badges for status, category, or special indicators.
components.accessibility: Badge information should also be in text content if critical.

components.name: Card Skeleton
components.usage: Show while content is loading. Replace with real content when ready.
components.accessibility: aria-busy indicates loading state to screen readers.

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Basic text input field with label.
components.usage: Always pair input with label element. Use appropriate input type.
components.accessibility: Label associated with input via nesting or for/id attributes.

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text input for longer content.
components.usage: Allow vertical resize only. Set reasonable default rows.
components.accessibility: Always include label. Clear focus indicators.

components.name: Select Dropdown
components.description: Native select dropdown for choosing from options.
components.usage: Use native select for simple choices. Consider alternatives for 10+ options.
components.accessibility: Native element is fully accessible. Clear visual feedback on focus.

components.name: Checkbox
components.usage: Use accent-color for custom styling. Always pair with label.
components.accessibility: Native element with clear focus states. Label clickable.

components.name: Radio Button
components.description: Radio buttons for mutually exclusive choices.
components.html: Choose one
components.usage: Use fieldset/legend for grouping related radios.
components.accessibility: Semantic fieldset/legend structure improves readability.

components.name: Input Group
components.description: Input with prefix/suffix icon or text.
components.usage: Great for search, currency, or phone inputs.
components.accessibility: Ensure focus states remain clear and accessible.

components.name: Form Group
components.description: Container with input, label, and error message.
components.html: Username must be 3+ characters
components.usage: Provides consistent spacing and error messaging.
components.accessibility: aria-describedby links input to error message.

components.name: Form Validation
components.usage: Use aria-invalid to indicate validation state.
components.accessibility: Color not the only indicator. Use icons or text too.

components.name: Form Hint Text
components.description: Helper text below form field for guidance.
components.html: At least 8 characters with uppercase and number
components.usage: Provide context or requirements before validation.
components.accessibility: aria-describedby connects hint to input field.

components.name: Form Layout
components.description: Container for multiple form fields with consistent spacing.
components.usage: Clean layout for any form. Responsive on mobile.
components.accessibility: Semantic form element with proper button type.

components.name: Info Alert
components.usage: Use for helpful information or tips.
components.accessibility: role="status" announces to screen readers.

components.name: Success Alert
components.usage: Show after successful form submission or action.
components.accessibility: Use role="status" for live region announcements.

components.name: Warning Alert
components.html:
⚠️

Please review this before proceeding.
components.usage: Use for warnings or important cautions.
components.accessibility: role="alert" for immediate announcements.

components.name: Error Alert
components.html:
✕

An error occurred. Please try again.
components.usage: Show error messages or failures.
components.accessibility: role="alert" for critical announcements.

components.name: Dismissible Alert
components.html: This message can be dismissed.
components.usage: Allow users to dismiss non-critical alerts.
components.accessibility: Button has clear aria-label for screen readers.

components.name: Alert with Action
components.usage: Use when alert requires user action.
components.accessibility: Button provides clear action path.

components.name: Toast Notification
components.usage: Show temporary notifications. Auto-remove after 3-4 seconds.
components.accessibility: role="status" for live region announcements.

components.name: Callout Box
components.html:
Did You Know?

This is a highlighted section for important info.
components.usage: Use for important tips or highlights in content.
components.accessibility: Clear visual hierarchy maintained.

components.name: Horizontal Navigation
components.description: Main horizontal navigation bar with semantic nav element.
components.usage: Main site navigation. Responsive: stack on mobile.
components.accessibility: Semantic <nav> element. Links have sufficient contrast.

components.name: Vertical Navigation
components.description: Vertical sidebar navigation for nested sections.
components.usage: Sidebar navigation, documentation menus.
components.accessibility: Semantic structure. Active state clearly indicated.

components.name: Breadcrumb Navigation
components.description: Hierarchical breadcrumb trail showing current location.
components.usage: Show location within site hierarchy. Help user orientation.
components.accessibility: aria-current marks current page. Semantic <ol> element.

components.name: Tab Navigation
components.description: Tabbed interface for switching between content sections.
components.html:
Content 1
Content 2
components.usage: Organize related content. Allow user selection.
components.accessibility: ARIA roles for keyboard navigation. aria-selected indicates active.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Navigate between pages of content or results.
components.html:
• 1
  • 2
  • 3
components.usage: Multi-page results, archives, content galleries.
components.accessibility: aria-current marks active page. Clear button labels.

components.name: Mobile Menu Drawer
components.html:
• Home
  • About
  • Services
components.usage: Mobile responsive navigation. Hide on desktop.
components.accessibility: aria-expanded indicates menu state. Keyboard closable.

components.name: Footer Navigation
components.usage: Footer link organization. Responsive columns.
components.accessibility: Semantic structure. Multiple nav sections for screen readers.

components.name: Container
components.usage: Use as page wrapper. Responsive at different breakpoints.
components.accessibility: Semantic container structure.

components.name: Two Column Grid
components.usage: Two-column layout that stacks on mobile.
components.accessibility: Responsive layout maintains readability.

components.name: Three Column Grid
components.usage: Three-column layout with auto-fit responsiveness.
components.accessibility: Adapts to all screen sizes naturally.

components.name: Sidebar Layout
components.usage: Common blog or documentation layout.
components.accessibility: Sidebar moves below main on mobile.

components.name: Flex Row
components.usage: Flexible row that wraps on smaller screens.
components.accessibility: Items stack responsively.

components.name: Centered Layout
components.usage: Perfect for hero sections, splash screens.
components.accessibility: Readable and accessible on all devices.

components.name: Header Hero
components.description: Large hero header with full-width background.
components.usage: Large, eye-catching intro section.
components.accessibility: Good color contrast maintained.

components.name: Footer Layout
components.usage: Multi-column footer for multiple link sections.
components.accessibility: Semantic footer element with nav regions.

components.name: Heading H1
components.description: Primary page heading with maximum prominence.
components.usage: Use only once per page for main heading. Sets page context.
components.accessibility: Semantic <h1> element. Screen readers announce as main heading.

components.name: Heading H2
components.description: Section heading for major content divisions.
components.usage: Organize page into logical sections. Use after H1.
components.accessibility: Semantic <h2> element. Maintains heading hierarchy.

components.name: Heading H3
components.usage: Subsections within H2 sections. Maintain hierarchy.
components.accessibility: Semantic <h3> element. Part of heading structure.

components.name: Body Text
components.description: Standard paragraph text with optimal readability.
components.html: This is body text. It should be easy to read with proper line length and spacing.
components.usage: Main paragraph content. Optimal readability at ~65 characters.
components.accessibility:
Semantic

element. Proper line-height for dyslexia friendly reading.

components.name: Emphasis & Strong
components.description: Inline emphasis and strong text formatting.
components.html: Use emphasis for semantic stress and strong for importance.
components.usage: Use <em> for stress, <strong> for importance. Not for styling alone.
components.accessibility: Semantic HTML conveys meaning to screen readers.

components.name: Small Text
components.html: <small>This is small text, good for fine print or secondary info.</small>
components.usage: Fine print, secondary information, disclaimers.
components.accessibility: Never use for critical information. Still readable.

components.name: Muted Text
components.description: Reduced emphasis text for non-critical information.
components.html: This is muted text for secondary context.
components.css: color: var(--a-text-muted);
components.usage: Timestamps, secondary labels, helper text.
components.accessibility: Sufficient contrast maintained. Not all users can see muted text.

components.name: Inline Code
components.usage: Inline code references, variable names, function calls.
components.accessibility: Monospace font aids recognition. Sufficient contrast.

components.name: Blockquote
components.html:
The best way to predict the future is to invent it.

— Alan Kay
components.usage: Quotes, testimonials, important excerpts.
components.accessibility: Semantic blockquote element. Footer identifies source.

components.name: Basic Table
components.description: Semantic HTML table with proper structure.
components.usage: Tabular data display. Semantic thead/tbody structure.
components.accessibility: Semantic <table> with proper TH elements for headers.

components.name: Unordered List
components.usage: Unordered items, features, benefits, bullet points.
components.accessibility: Semantic <ul> element. Screen reader announces list structure.

components.name: Ordered List
components.usage: Steps, processes, ranking, numbered sequences.
components.accessibility: Semantic <ol> element. Order is semantic meaning.

components.name: Description List
components.html:
<dl>
  <dt>Term One</dt>
  <dd>Definition of term one.</dd>
  <dt>Term Two</dt>
  <dd>Definition of term two.</dd>
</dl>
components.usage: Glossaries, definitions, FAQ, key-value pairs.
components.accessibility: Semantic <dl>, <dt>, <dd> elements for relationships.

components.name: Statistics Grid
components.usage: Dashboards, metrics, key performance indicators.
components.accessibility: Semantic structure. Numbers readable by screen readers.

components.name: Timeline
components.html:
1. Event One

    Description of first event.

  2. Event Two

    Description of second event.
components.usage: History, roadmaps, process flows, chronological events.
components.accessibility: Semantic <ol> with text descriptions of events.

components.name: Comparison Table
components.usage: Pricing tables, feature comparison, side-by-side analysis.
components.accessibility: Semantic table. Clear headers distinguish sections.

components.name: Modal Dialog
components.description: Overlay dialog for important information or actions.
components.html:
Dialog Title

Dialog content goes here.
components.usage: Confirmations, forms, important announcements. Use semantic <dialog>.
components.accessibility: Native <dialog> element. Trap focus automatically.

components.name: Tooltip
components.usage: Extra help text, clarifications. Keyboard-accessible.
components.accessibility: Use title attribute as fallback for keyboard users.

components.name: Popover
components.html:
Information

Detailed information goes here.
components.usage: Rich information, multi-line content. HTML Popover API.
components.accessibility: Native popover element. Keyboard accessible with API.

components.name: Loading Spinner
components.usage: Async operations, data loading, processing.
components.accessibility: role="status" announces to screen readers.

components.name: Progress Bar
components.usage: File uploads, multi-step forms, downloads.
components.accessibility: Semantic <progress> element. Accessible API.

components.name: Accordion
components.usage: FAQs, collapsible documentation, space-saving content.
components.accessibility: Semantic <details> and <summary>. Keyboard accessible.

components.name: Dropdown Select
components.usage: Option selection. Use native element when possible.
components.accessibility: Native <select> element. Fully accessible by default.

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.usage: Boolean settings, feature toggles, on/off controls.
components.accessibility: Semantic <input type="checkbox">. Label clickable.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small label for status or category.
components.usage: Use for status labels, tags, or indicators.
components.accessibility: Use in combination with text for clarity.

components.name: Breadcrumb Navigation
components.usage: Show page hierarchy. Always make current page non-clickable.
components.accessibility: Use aria-current="page" for current location.

components.name: Pagination
components.html:
• 1
  • 2
  • 3
components.usage: Use for listing items across multiple pages.
components.accessibility: aria-current marks active page. aria-label on buttons.

components.name: Tab Navigation
components.html:
Content 1
Content 2
components.usage: Organize content into multiple views.
components.accessibility: ARIA roles for keyboard navigation and screen readers.

components.name: Tooltip
components.usage: Provide additional context on hover.
components.accessibility: Use title attribute as fallback for keyboard users.

components.name: Loading Spinner
components.usage: Show during async operations.
components.accessibility: role="status" and aria-label for screen readers.

components.name: Progress Bar
components.usage: Show operation progress. Use native <progress> element.
components.accessibility: Semantic element with aria-label for context.

components.name: Dropdown Menu
components.usage: Hide/show menu on button click.
components.accessibility: Requires JavaScript for keyboard navigation.

components.name: Modal Dialog
components.usage: Use semantic <dialog> element.
components.accessibility: Native dialog element with proper focus management.
